headline: Intel Invests €5 Billion to Expand Manufacturing in Europe
summary:

headline: Intel Announces Leadership Appointment at Intel Foundry to Accelerate Development and Manufacturing
summary:
SANTA CLARA, Calif., June 18, 2026 — Intel Corporation today announced the appointment of Seok-Hee Lee as executive vice president of Intel Foundry, reporting directly to CEO Lip-Bu Tan. In this role, Lee will lead all advanced packaging, system integration, back-end technology development, and back-end manufacturing, strengthening Intel’s ability to deliver differentiated, system-level innovation for …
